summary: Decent but audience‑heavy recording with early shakiness; full set present but no notable highlights mentioned.
review: The recording offers a loud and clear sound overall, though it starts out a bit shaky and contains a lot of audience noise, making it feel like you're right in the venue. The show includes every song from the performance, but reviewers did not point out any standout musical moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; shows a decent but imperfect recording and no specific comments on performance quality, leading to an overall middling score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Decent overall clarity but a little shaky at the start; too much audience presence throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Full set present; no specific comments on pacing or flow.
